monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.description: A small, green creature with a rusty knife.

monsters.name: Light Wisp
monsters.description: A floating ball of warm light.

monsters.name: Shadow Stalker
monsters.description: A vague humanoid shape that blends into the darkness.

monsters.name: Wild Boar
monsters.description: An aggressive boar with sharp tusks.

monsters.name: Brown Bear
monsters.description: A massive bear with thick fur.

monsters.name: Training Dummy
monsters.description: A straw-stuffed dummy for combat practice.

monsters.name: Town Guard
monsters.description: A stoic guard in chainmail armor.

monsters.name: Traveling Merchant
monsters.description: A weary traveler with a large backpack.

monsters.name: Street Urchin
monsters.description: A dirty child with quick fingers.

monsters.name: Drunkard
monsters.description: He sways back and forth, mumbling incoherently.

monsters.name: Wild Dog
monsters.description: A mangy dog with bared teeth.

monsters.name: Weary Traveler
monsters.description: A traveler resting by the side of the road.

monsters.name: The Tavern Keeper
monsters.description: A burly man cleaning a mug with a dirty rag.

monsters.name: The Forgotten Mayor
monsters.description: A skeletal figure in tattered noble finery. He clutches a rusted key.

monsters.name: Giant Rat
monsters.description: A large, filthy rat with beady eyes.

monsters.name: Bandit
monsters.description: A rough-looking man with a scar across his cheek.

monsters.name: Cultist
monsters.description: A figure in dark robes chanting softly.

monsters.name: Dire Wolf
monsters.description: A large wolf with grey fur and intelligent eyes.

monsters.name: Skeleton
monsters.description: A pile of bones held together by dark magic.

monsters.name: Restless Ghost
monsters.description: A translucent spirit moaning softly.

monsters.name: Zombie
monsters.description: A rotting corpse that hungers for flesh.

monsters.name: Green Slime
monsters.description: A quivering blob of green goo.

monsters.name: Giant Leech
monsters.description: A slimy parasite looking for blood.

monsters.name: Swamp Witch
monsters.description: A cackling hag stirring a cauldron.

monsters.name: Giant Scorpion
monsters.description: A menacing arachnid with a poisonous tail.

monsters.name: Sand Worm
monsters.description: A massive worm that burrows through the sand.

monsters.name: Yeti
monsters.description: A towering ape-like creature covered in white fur.

monsters.name: Ice Wolf
monsters.description: A wolf with fur as white as snow and eyes like blue ice.

monsters.name: Avatar of Solas
monsters.description: The Crusader, radiating justice and war.

monsters.name: Avatar of Celeris
monsters.description: The Duelist, moving with blinding speed.

monsters.name: Avatar of Aegis
monsters.description: The Guardian, an unyielding wall of light.

monsters.name: Avatar of Lumos
monsters.description: The Scholar, surrounded by floating runes.

monsters.name: Avatar of Sophia
monsters.description: The Saint, glowing with healing warmth.

monsters.name: Avatar of Fortuna
monsters.description: The Merchant, whose form shifts like gold coins.

monsters.name: Avatar of Malice
monsters.description: The Tyrant, clad in spiked black iron.

monsters.name: Avatar of Nox
monsters.description: A cloaked figure whose face is an endless void, representing the Kingdom of Dark.

monsters.name: Avatar of Blight
monsters.description: The Undying, dripping with decay.

monsters.name: Avatar of Vex
monsters.description: The Warlock, whispering curses.

monsters.name: Avatar of Umbra
monsters.description: The Cultist, shrouded in madness.

monsters.name: Avatar of Jinx
monsters.description: The Trickster, grinning with chaotic intent.

monsters.name: Avatar of Krog
monsters.description: A massive being of bark and stone with glowing green eyes, representing the Kingdom of Instinct.

monsters.name: Avatar of Feral
monsters.description: The Hunter, stalking its prey.

monsters.name: Avatar of Ursus
monsters.description: The Survivor, bearing scars of survival.

monsters.name: Avatar of Echo
monsters.description: The Storm, crackling with lightning.

monsters.name: Avatar of Sylva
monsters.description: The Tamer, surrounded by nature's growth.

monsters.name: Avatar of Raven
monsters.description: The Scavenger, watching with beady eyes.

monsters.name: Crystal Golem
monsters.description: A lumbering construct made of jagged crystals.

monsters.name: Prism Spider
monsters.description: A spider with a translucent, refracting carapace.

monsters.name: Temple Guardian
monsters.description: A construct of gold and light, guarding the holy places.

monsters.name: Luminescent Beetle
monsters.description: A large beetle that glows softly.

monsters.name: Shadow Wraith
monsters.description: A floating spirit of pure darkness that chills the air.

monsters.name: Void Construct
monsters.description: A suit of black armor animated by void energy.

monsters.name: Dark Acolyte
monsters.description: A robed figure chanting whispers to the void.

monsters.name: Abyssal Leech
monsters.description: A black slug-like creature that drains vitality.

monsters.name: Treant Sapling
monsters.description: A small walking tree with whipping branches.

monsters.name: Moss Golem
monsters.description: A heavy construct of stone covered in thick moss.

monsters.name: Feral Druid
monsters.description: A wild-eyed human wearing furs and antlers.

monsters.name: Giant Wasp
monsters.description: A massive insect with a deadly stinger.

monsters.name: Moss Wolf
monsters.description: A wolf with fur resembling thick green moss, blending perfectly with the forest floor.

monsters.name: Thorn Sprite
monsters.description: A tiny, fluttering creature made of sharp twigs and leaves.

monsters.name: Wild Stag
monsters.description: A majestic deer with large antlers.

monsters.name: River Drake
monsters.description: A sleek, scaled predator that moves effortlessly through water.

monsters.name: Mud Crab
monsters.description: A large crab covered in hardened mud.

monsters.name: Bark Golem
monsters.description: A lumbering construct made of animated wood and vines.

monsters.name: Rot Sapling
monsters.description: A small, twisted tree creature dripping with dark ichor.

monsters.name: Rotwood Ancient
monsters.description: A massive, corrupted treant with glowing red eyes. The heart of the forest's decay.

monsters.name: Fire Elemental
monsters.description: A living column of flame.

monsters.name: Air Elemental
monsters.description: A swirling vortex of wind and lightning.

monsters.name: Swamp Hydra
monsters.description: A massive reptilian beast with three snapping heads.
